Interface ExportHistoryDao

public interface ExportHistoryDao
Data Access Object (DAO) interface for ExportHistory entity. Declares CRUD operations for managing export history records. Note: Export records are generally immutable once created, so no update operations are provided.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    LiveData<Integer>
    countByProject(long projectId)
    Gets the count of export records for a specific project.
    int
    delete(ExportHistory exportHistory)
    Deletes an export history record from the database.
    int
    delete(ExportHistory... exportHistories)
    Deletes multiple export history records from the database.
    int
    deleteByProject(long projectId)
    Deletes all export history records for a specific project.
    int
    deleteOlderThan(long projectId, long exportHistoryId)
    Deletes export history records older than a specific export record.
    LiveData<Long>
    getTotalSizeByProject(long projectId)
    Gets the total storage size (in bytes) used by exports for a specific project.

    Inserts a single export history record into the database.
    List<Long>
    insert(ExportHistory... exportHistories)
    Inserts multiple export history records into the database.
    List<Long>
    insert(Collection<ExportHistory> exportHistories)
    Inserts multiple export history records into the database.
    LiveData<ExportHistory>
    select(long exportHistoryId)
    Retrieves an export history record by its ID.
    LiveData<List<ExportHistory>>
    selectAll()
    Retrieves all export history records across all projects, ordered by export time (most recent first).
    LiveData<List<ExportHistory>>

    Retrieves export history records for a specific project and file format.

    selectByProject(long projectId)
    Retrieves all export history records for a specific project, ordered by export time (most recent first).
    LiveData<List<ExportHistory>>
    selectByResolution(long projectId, int resolution)
    Retrieves export history records for a specific project and resolution.
    LiveData<ExportHistory>
    selectMostRecent(long projectId)
    Retrieves the most recent export record for a specific project.
    LiveData<List<ExportHistory>>
    selectRecent(int limit)
    Retrieves a limited number of recent export records across all projects.

  • Method Details

    • insert

      long insert(ExportHistory exportHistory)
      Inserts a single export history record into the database.
      Parameters:
      exportHistory - ExportHistory instance to insert.
      Returns:
      ID of the newly inserted export record.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(Collection<ExportHistory> exportHistories)
      Inserts multiple export history records into the database.
      Parameters:
      exportHistories - Collection of export records to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted export records.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(ExportHistory... exportHistories)
      Inserts multiple export history records into the database.
      Parameters:
      exportHistories - Variable number of export records to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted export records.

    • delete

      int delete(ExportHistory exportHistory)
      Deletes an export history record from the database.
      Parameters:
      exportHistory - ExportHistory instance to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • delete

      int delete(ExportHistory... exportHistories)
      Deletes multiple export history records from the database.
      Parameters:
      exportHistories - Variable number of export records to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • select

      LiveData<ExportHistory> select(long exportHistoryId)
      Retrieves an export history record by its ID.
      Parameters:
      exportHistoryId - Export history ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the export record, or null if not found.

    • selectByProject

      LiveData<List<ExportHistory>> selectByProject(long projectId)
      Retrieves all export history records for a specific project, ordered by export time (most recent first).
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of export records for the specified project.

    • selectMostRecent

      LiveData<ExportHistory> selectMostRecent(long projectId)
      Retrieves the most recent export record for a specific project.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the most recent export record, or null if none exist.

    • selectByFormat

      LiveData<List<ExportHistory>> selectByFormat(long projectId, String fileFormat)
      Retrieves export history records for a specific project and file format.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      fileFormat - File format (e.g., "PNG", "JPG").
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of export records with the specified format.

    • selectByResolution

      LiveData<List<ExportHistory>> selectByResolution(long projectId, int resolution)
      Retrieves export history records for a specific project and resolution.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      resolution - Resolution value.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of export records with the specified resolution.

    • countByProject

      LiveData<Integer> countByProject(long projectId)
      Gets the count of export records for a specific project.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the number of export records for the project.

    • getTotalSizeByProject

      LiveData<Long> getTotalSizeByProject(long projectId)
      Gets the total storage size (in bytes) used by exports for a specific project.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the total file size in bytes.

    • selectAll

      LiveData<List<ExportHistory>> selectAll()
      Retrieves all export history records across all projects, ordered by export time (most recent first).
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of all export records.

    • selectRecent

      LiveData<List<ExportHistory>> selectRecent(int limit)
      Retrieves a limited number of recent export records across all projects.
      Parameters:
      limit - Maximum number of records to retrieve.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of recent export records.

    • deleteByProject

      int deleteByProject(long projectId)
      Deletes all export history records for a specific project.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • deleteOlderThan

      int deleteOlderThan(long projectId, long exportHistoryId)
      Deletes export history records older than a specific export record.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      exportHistoryId - Export history ID threshold (records older than this will be deleted).
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.
